Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "MRMEPHISTO-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mr Mephisto.prg"
Metadata.Notes: This game has a BASIC program to display the title screen, so the following steps were taken to retain this: 1. A new routine was placed at $C000 which sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers and runs the title screen program. 2. This routine also disables the RUN/STOP key by modifying the STOP vector by setting $E1 at $0328.
